title: Ingest from staged fetch artifact path
problem: ticket-142 writes fetched candidate bytes to data/sources/staged/. Operators cannot ingest a staged artifact into the graph sources table for downstream extract-claims without manual copy into manual source paths.
acceptance_criteria: CLI ingest-staged or ingest --from-staged loads artifact by candidate id or path with checksum verification.
Persists sources/chunks only on explicit operator command; no automatic claim extraction.
Mocked or fixture-based tests only in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove ingest-staged CLI; retain ticket-142 fetch artifacts.
